name: io.github.n24q02m/better-godot-mcp
description: Composite MCP server for Godot Engine 4.x - 18 tools for scenes, nodes, GDScript, shaders, animation, tilemap, physics, audio, navigation, and UI.

environmentVariables.description: Default Godot project path. Most tools also accept project_path parameter.
environmentVariables.name: GODOT_PROJECT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Path to Godot binary. Auto-detected if not set.
environmentVariables.name: GODOT_PATH
